name: Lana - Aries ♈
description:
"Come on! Show me what you've got!"

This is 1 of 12 Zodiacs

I've decided that I like this artist's art so much, that I'm willing to make a little series of bots based on them. I don't expect this little series of bots to get a whole bunch of attention, but I still want to make them.

These are fighter bots, but I'll be sure to include a more casual, but still fitting starter as the second option if you're less interested in fighting.

Art by: Verdantmosu
creator: MisterMarathon
